title: DEKTON PRO Automatic Wire Stripper and Crimper - Tool for Precision Wire Cutting, Stripping & Crimping | Strips 10-24 AWG Wire, Crimps Insulated Terminals 22-10 AWG, Non-Insulated 22-8 AWG
features: Versatile Functionality: Automatic Wire Stripper and Crimper is a heavy-duty multifunctional tool designed for precise wire cutting, stripping, and crimping. Its adjustable jaws ensure compatibility with various wire gauges and terminal types, making it ideal for professional,

Precision and Durability: Equipped with high-quality alloy steel jaws, this tool delivers exceptional durability and performance. It strips wire gauges from 10 AWG to 24 AWG (0.2 - 6.0 mm) with precision, while the high-quality blade ensures clean cuts every time,

Ergonomic Design: The ergonomic handle of the DEKTON PRO tool is designed for comfort during extended use. Its user-friendly design reduces hand fatigue and provides a secure grip, allowing for greater control and accuracy when cutting, stripping, or crimping wires.

Wide Range of Terminal Compatibility:Suitable for a variety of terminals, including insulated terminals from 22-10 AWG (0.5 - 6.0 mm) and non-insulated terminals from 22-8 AWG (0.5 - 8.0 mm). It also accommodates auto ignition terminals with a diameter of 7-8 mm.

Heavy-Duty Construction: Built to withstand rigorous use,features a durable construction that ensures long-lasting performance. Its robust design is perfect for tackling demanding tasks in professional settings or home projects, ensuring reliability and effectiveness with every use.
description: From the manufacturer Dekton products are manufactured to high quality standard. Dekton offer good value for money and several use features to improve the performance of our products. Our products are sourced with strict ethical and quality standards from around the world. Suitable for insulated terminals 22-10 AWG (0.5-6.0mm). Suitable for non-insulated terminals 22-8 AWG (0.5-8.0mm).
